expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> element containing :root selector variables was found.

expectations.text: No external CSS files are imported (no css link loader or old css import)
expectations.evidence: No <link rel="stylesheet"> for html-deck.css, and no @import rules found.

expectations.text: The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
expectations.evidence: Core variables defined correctly inside inline style :root.

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard against background colors
expectations.evidence: Text color derived with 40% opacity (rgba(from var(--hd-theme-text-color) r g b / 0.4)) against pitch black (#050505) yields ~1.8:1 contrast, failing the 4.5:1 requirement.
